title: Foundations of Context Engineering
chunk_text: What context engineering means explains how a RAG system can use Elasticsearch to retrieve context that is relevant, safe, and compact. The main idea is to make retrieval decisions explicit, then pass only useful evidence to the model.

title: Foundations of Context Engineering
